response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer currently working as Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq on an identical tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AI agent infrastructure). Brings 19+ years of full-stack development with consistent senior/staff-level roles and demonstrated software craftsmanship practices. Primary concern is lack of explicit React experience despite Ember.js background and proven full-stack capability; secondary concerns around specific framework and security expertise require validation.
strengths: Currently executing the exact role at re:cinq: TypeScript, Node.js full-stack, and AI-agent infrastructure development
19+ years of full-stack engineering with consistent senior and staff-level positions across multiple organizations
Strong backend expertise including Node.js microservices architecture, performance optimization, and infrastructure (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit React experience; resume emphasizes Ember.js and other frameworks but not React, which is primary stack requirement
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) and Nest.js not mentioned despite testing culture evident and strong Node.js background
Security and authentication expertise not detailed in resume despite being listed as required technical skill

key_factors.factor: Current role at re:cinq matches exact tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, AI agents)
No demonstrated React experience contradicts primary stack requirement
19+ years with consistent seniority demonstrates deep capability and fast framework adoption
